name: Careem Pay
description: Refer a friend to Careem Pay — earn AED 40 in your wallet for every friend who sends at least AED 1,000 using your link. Up to AED 2,000 in total (50 successful referrals).

name: Talabat
description: Invite a friend — both of you get AED 30 off your next order on Talabat.

name: Noon
description: Refer friends to noon — earn store credit when they place a qualifying first order.

name: Deliveroo
description: Share your Deliveroo code — your friend gets AED 25 off their first order, you earn AED 25 in credit.

name: Kibsons
description: Refer a friend to Kibsons — both get AED 50 in credit when they place their first order.

name: InstaShop
description: Invite a friend to InstaShop — both of you get AED 25 off your next grocery order.

name: Carrefour UAE
description: Refer a friend to Carrefour — both get AED 50 off when they spend AED 100 on their first order.

name: Amazon.ae
description: Amazon.ae runs limited-time Refer-a-Friend promotions — invite friends from Your Account when active.

name: Mashreq NEO
description: Refer up to 5 friends to Mashreq NEO in 90 days — earn AED 100–200 per successful referral.

name: ADCB Hayyak
description: Refer a friend to ADCB — when they open an eligible account, you both get a cash reward.

name: Liv. Digital Bank
description: Refer a friend to Liv. — earn cashback when they open and fund their account.

name: Etisalat by e&
description: Invite a friend to e& — get 500MB of free mobile data per successful invite.

name: du
description: Refer a friend to du — both of you get bonus mobile data when they activate a new line.

name: Rain
description: Refer a friend to Rain — both of you earn USD 5 in crypto when they pass identity verification and trade.

name: YAP
description: Refer a friend to YAP — both of you get AED 50 in your YAP wallet when they top up for the first time.

name: Rehlat
description: Refer friends to Rehlat — earn travel credit when they book their first flight or hotel.

name: Cobone
description: Refer a friend to Cobone — both of you get AED 25 in deal credit when they make their first purchase.

name: Fitness First Middle East
description: Refer a friend to Fitness First — when they sign up for a membership, you receive a complimentary month.

name: The Warehouse Gym
description: Refer a friend to The Warehouse Gym — earn a free month added to your membership when they join.

name: The Little Gym Dubai
description: Refer a friend to The Little Gym — receive a free class when their child enrolls in a term.

name: KidZania Dubai
description: Refer a friend to KidZania Dubai — both of you earn KidZos credit when they purchase an annual pass.

name: Privilee
description: Refer a friend to Privilee — both of you get one bonus month added to your membership when they join.

name: The Select App
description: Share your Select code — when a friend subscribes, both of you receive bonus offers credit.

name: Washmen
description: Refer a friend to Washmen — both of you get AED 50 off your next laundry order.

name: Justlife
description: Refer a friend to Justlife — both of you get AED 50 off your next home-services booking.
